name: Restaurant Tycoon
description: Build the most profitable restaurant and become a real tycoon! Start with a small kitchen and gradually develop a huge restaurant with many floors, managers, and customers. Hire employees, upgrade your kitchens, speed up your elevator, and earn more money! Even when youre not playing, your restaurant continues to generate profits. Game Features: Expand your restaurant floor by floor ‍ Hire managers for automatic work Upgrade your kitchens and speed up your food preparation Upgrade your elevator to serve customers faster Earn profits even when youre not in the game Compete with other players in tournaments
instructions: The game is controlled by the mouse cursor tap on the screen Hire managers Improve the levels of the elevator the kitchen and the restaurant itself Earn coins Open new floors Going into the game after some time you will get a big reward for i
